title: UniCycle Marketplace
description: A campus-verified online marketplace designed for university students to safely buy, sell, and trade textbooks, electronics, dorm essentials, and more within a trusted community environment.
challenge: Creating a full-featured marketplace platform from scratch that handles user authentication, product listings with image uploads, and a campus-verified trust system — all while following Rational Unified Process (RUP) methodology for structured iterative development with proper documentation and phase deliverables.
solution: I built the platform using Node.js with Express 5 and MongoDB/Mongoose for flexible document storage. Authentication uses bcrypt for password hashing with express-session for state management. Image uploads are handled through Multer middleware. The EJS templating engine with express-ejs-layouts provides a clean MVC-like separation. I followed RUP methodology throughout, producing inception, elaboration, and construction phase artifacts.

features.title: Secure Authentication
features.desc: bcrypt password hashing, express-session management, and connect-flash messaging for login/registration feedback.

features.title: Product Listings
features.desc: Full CRUD for marketplace listings with category icons, pricing, condition status, and multi-image upload support.

features.title: Image Upload System
features.desc: Multer-powered file upload middleware with server-side validation and storage management.

features.title: Campus Verification
features.desc: Registration system designed for university-affiliated students with profile management and community trust features.

features.title: RUP Methodology
features.desc: Rational Unified Process with inception, elaboration, construction, and transition phase documentation.

features.title: Dark/Light Theme
features.desc: System-aware theme toggle with CSS custom properties for seamless light and dark mode switching.
